title: London Air Quality Network monthly-mean NO2 panel for the 2019 central-ULEZ controlled-ITS (treated central congestion-charge-zone roadside + control outer-London roadside stations), 2017-01 to 2020-06
publisher: London Air Quality Network (Imperial College London / King's College London ERG)
vintage: LAQN ratified hourly NO2 aggregated to monthly means, one row per (monitoring station, month) over 2017-01..2020-06. Treated panel = 10 central congestion-charge-zone roadside/kerbside stations covered by the 8 Apr 2019 central ULEZ (CD9 CT2 CT4 CT6 HK6 IM1 MR8 MY1 NB1 WM6); control panel = 20 outer-London roadside/kerbside stations not covered until the 2023 expansion (BY7 CR5 CR7 CR9 EA6 EI1 EN4 EN5 GB6 HR2 HV1 HV3 KT4 ME2 ME9 RB4 RHG RI1 ST4 ST6). Each row carries the monthly-mean NO2 (ug/m3) and the number of valid hours behind it (capture).
notes: LAQN publishes monitoring data ONLY through the Imperial ERG API (api.erg.ic.ac.uk/AirQuality) as raw hourly values — there is no single bulk monthly CSV upstream. This canonical file was assembled once by `scripts/ulez_harvest.py --event 2019` (per-(station, year) hourly NO2 slices aggregated to monthly means with an hours-captured count). The Go build reads only this frozen file, hash-pinned and mirrored to object storage; re-running needs network and may differ as LAQN ratifies/revises historical hours. The controlled ITS reads the break in the central-minus-outer monthly difference at the 8 Apr 2019 instant (transition month 2019-04 excluded; post window capped at 2020-02 to keep the COVID traffic collapse out).
